texto: Look at the sky. Does its sapphire hue dim when you take a single breath? Are the stars drawn closer when you weep? The sky cannot be diminished so. Thus it is with the spirit: it is a thing without beginning or end.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Elaine Cunningham que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Look at the sky. Does its sapphire hue dim when you take a single breath? Are the stars drawn clo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, spirit, sapphire, com foco em termino e reflexao.
